case_title: EHMAN, KELLY A. vs. WANG, JIMMY YI FU et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EHMAN, KELLY A. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, JIMMY YI FU DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-15-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-28-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1997, OFF CALENDAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-15-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT'S IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-24-1997, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION AGAINST DEFT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY HAROLD E. MCDERMID. PLTF'S ATTY TO FILE NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-24-1997 TO OCT-29-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-29-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-29-1997, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-1997 CONTINUED FROM OCT-29-1997 TO DEC-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF EHMAN, KELLY A.
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1997, DISMISSAL CASE SETTLED. LAST SANCTIONS VACATED.
